data.content: Plan approved in plan_review. Root cause is confirmed: scripts/setup.sh:67 and scripts/agent-wizard.sh:51 still use unsafe printf '->', while scripts/install.sh already uses printf '%s' '->'. Scope is minimal and correct, invariants list is empty, and a repo-wide scan of scripts found no additional printf-with-leading-dash cases beyond the two planned fixes. Test strategy is adequate for this change: syntax-check both scripts and verify no remaining matching patterns before reinstall/runtime verification.
